notes.time_traps: 60-180min emails â€” tests cost-vs-reward. Includes extreme VIP trap (id=119: p=10, 90min)
notes.low_priority_vips: VIP emails with base_priority <= 3 â€” blind-VIP-response trap
notes.ambiguous_priority: Normal sender, priority 9-10 â€” agent must read content not sender rank
notes.ambiguous_spam: Spam with priority 7-9 and urgent-sounding subjects â€” phishing/invoice traps
notes.wellbeing_scenarios: ids 120, 243 â€” tests agent handles human/emotional context
notes.reply_chains: id 242 â€” forwarded thread, agent must parse multi-sender context
notes.gdpr_legal: id 245 â€” long-form legal email with statutory deadline
notes.extreme_trap: id 119 â€” board investor, p=10, 90min, due tomorrow â€” hardest decision in dataset

vip_emails.subject: Q4 Budget Review â€” Need Your Sign-off
vip_emails.body: Hi, I need your approval on the Q4 budget allocation before the board meeting Friday. The doc is attached. Please review the headcount section especially â€” we're over by 12%. This blocks the entire planning process.

vip_emails.subject: Architecture Decision: Microservices Migration
vip_emails.body: Team, we need a final call on the microservices migration plan. I've read both proposals and need your input by EOD. Engineering is blocked on sprint planning until this is decided. Please review the attached comparison doc and share your recommendation.

vip_emails.subject: Lunch tomorrow?
vip_emails.body: Hey, are you free for lunch tomorrow around 1pm? Thinking Thai place near the office. Just a casual catch-up, nothing urgent.

vip_emails.subject: Contract Renewal â€” Urgent Decision Needed
vip_emails.body: Following up on our contract renewal discussion. Our legal team needs a response by Thursday or we will need to pause the engagement and evaluate alternatives. Please confirm the terms we discussed in last week's call.

vip_emails.subject: All-hands prep â€” slides due by 5pm
vip_emails.body: Please send me your team's slides for tomorrow's all-hands by 5pm today. We need to review everything before the presentation. Keep it to 3 slides max.

vip_emails.subject: Compliance Filing â€” 48 Hour Deadline
vip_emails.body: This is a compliance reminder. The regulatory filing requires your department sign-off within 48 hours. Missing this deadline carries a financial penalty. Please review Section 4 of the attached document and confirm.

vip_emails.subject: 50-page Infrastructure Audit Report â€” Full Written Response Needed
vip_emails.body: Please find attached the full infrastructure audit report (52 pages). I need a comprehensive written response covering: security gaps identified in Section 3, your proposed remediation timeline for all 14 findings, and cost estimates. This is the big one â€” please be thorough.

vip_emails.subject: Complete Contract Review â€” All 8 Vendor Agreements
vip_emails.body: Please review all 8 vendor contracts (attached as separate PDFs) and provide a written analysis of liability clauses, termination terms, and renewal conditions. We need a comprehensive memo covering all agreements for the board audit next week.

vip_emails.subject: Quick question about office coffee
vip_emails.body: Hey, do you prefer the dark roast or light roast coffee in the break room? We're placing a new order and want to know team preferences. No rush at all â€” reply when you get a second.

vip_emails.subject: Team offsite â€” venue preference poll
vip_emails.body: We're planning the Q1 team offsite. I've narrowed it down to two venues â€” a mountain retreat or a beach resort. What's your preference? Just reply with A or B. No urgency, we decide next month.

vip_emails.subject: New partnership opportunity â€” your thoughts?
vip_emails.body: A strategic partner reached out about a potential co-marketing initiative. I'd love your high-level take before I schedule the intro call. I've attached their one-pager. No deadline yet, just exploring.

vip_emails.subject: Q3 Business Review â€” Can we schedule?
vip_emails.body: It's time for our quarterly business review. Please share your availability for a 90-minute session in the next two weeks. Our account team will circulate a pre-read 48 hours before. Looking forward to it.

vip_emails.subject: Hiring committee â€” final decision needed
vip_emails.body: We've completed all rounds for the Staff Engineer role. The committee is split 3-2 in favour of Candidate A. I need your tie-breaking vote by noon tomorrow before the offer expires. I've attached both scorecards.

vip_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Q4 Budget Review
vip_emails.body: I haven't heard back on my earlier email about the Q4 budget sign-off. This is blocking the entire planning process. Please respond ASAP â€” we're already delayed and the board is asking questions.

vip_emails.subject: SECOND FOLLOW UP: Architecture Decision URGENT
vip_emails.body: This is my second followup on the microservices migration. We are now 3 days behind on sprint planning and the team is completely blocked. I need your response TODAY. The longer this drags, the more it costs us. Please prioritize this immediately.

vip_emails.subject: FINAL NOTICE: Contract Renewal Decision
vip_emails.body: This is our final followup. We have not received a response on the contract renewal and our deadline has passed. Our legal team is now preparing to terminate the agreement. If you want to continue the partnership, we need a response by end of business today â€” no exceptions.

vip_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: All-hands slides â€” still missing yours
vip_emails.body: The all-hands is in 3 hours and I still don't have your team's slides. Everyone else has submitted. I need them in the next 30 minutes or your segment will be cut. Please send immediately.

vip_emails.subject: Annual legal training â€” completion required
vip_emails.body: This is your reminder to complete the mandatory annual legal and compliance training module in the HR portal. The module takes approximately 45 minutes. Deadline is end of this month. All employees must complete this.

vip_emails.subject: Due diligence request â€” full technical audit by tomorrow
vip_emails.body: As part of our Series B due diligence, our technical advisors require a full written assessment of your infrastructure, security posture, data handling practices, and engineering team capacity. This must cover: (1) system architecture overview, (2) security audit findings from the past 12 months, (3) incident history and resolution times, (4) scalability roadmap, and (5) team org chart with tenure. Our investment committee meets tomorrow at 9 AM. This is non-negotiable for the round to proceed.

vip_emails.subject: Concerned about one of your team members
vip_emails.body: Hey, I wanted to flag something sensitive. I've noticed that one of your engineers has seemed really burnt out lately â€” missing standups, short responses in Slack, and a colleague mentioned they seemed upset last week. I think a quiet check-in from you as their manager would mean a lot. No action required on my end, just wanted to give you the heads-up. Handle when you can.

normal_emails.subject: PR Review Request â€” Small Fix
normal_emails.body: Hey, could you review my pull request when you get a moment? It's a small bug fix in the auth module â€” about 50 lines changed. No rush, just whenever you have 10 minutes.

normal_emails.subject: Sprint Planning Input Needed
normal_emails.body: Hi, can you review the sprint backlog and add your team's capacity estimates for next sprint? The planning doc is linked below. We need this by tomorrow for the sprint planning meeting.

normal_emails.subject: Design Review â€” New Onboarding Flow
normal_emails.body: Sharing the updated onboarding flow designs for your feedback. Focus especially on the mobile screens â€” we made significant changes based on the user research. Loom video walkthrough is attached (8 min).

normal_emails.subject: Annual Review â€” Self-Assessment Due
normal_emails.body: Reminder: your self-assessment for the annual performance review is due in 2 weeks. Please complete the form in Workday. It should take about 30-45 minutes. Let me know if you have any questions.

normal_emails.subject: Data Question on Last Month's Numbers
normal_emails.body: Quick question â€” in the October metrics dashboard, the conversion rate shows 3.2% but my calculation gives 2.9%. Can you check which source is correct? I want to make sure the board deck uses the right figure.

normal_emails.subject: Customer Escalation â€” Need Technical Input
normal_emails.body: We have a customer (mid-tier account, $80k ARR) threatening to churn due to API performance issues. They want a call with engineering this week. Can you join a 30-minute call Thursday at 2pm and provide context on our roadmap?

normal_emails.subject: Office Supply Order â€” Submit by Friday
normal_emails.body: Please submit your team's office supply requests through the facilities portal by Friday. We're doing a consolidated order. Link below.

normal_emails.subject: Interview Panel â€” Tuesday 3pm
normal_emails.body: You're confirmed for the interview panel on Tuesday at 3pm for the Senior Engineer candidate. Please review the resume (attached) and prepare 2-3 technical questions. The debrief will be 30 minutes after the interview.

normal_emails.subject: Integration Partnership Proposal
normal_emails.body: We're reaching out to explore a technical integration between our platforms. We believe there's significant value for both user bases. I've attached a 10-page proposal outline. Would love to schedule a 30-minute exploratory call.

normal_emails.subject: Production Bug â€” Users Affected
normal_emails.body: We have a live bug affecting about 200 users on the checkout flow. I've identified the issue but need your approval to push a hotfix outside of normal deploy windows. Can you approve?

normal_emails.subject: Critical Security Vulnerability Found
normal_emails.body: I was testing the API and found what looks like an authentication bypass vulnerability. Users can access other users' data by manipulating the session token. I've documented the steps to reproduce. This seems serious but I'm not sure who to escalate to â€” please help.

normal_emails.subject: Detailed Product Roadmap Review â€” Full Year Planning
normal_emails.body: Can you review the entire 2025 product roadmap (30-page doc attached) and provide feedback on feasibility, resource needs, and dependencies for each quarter? We need your detailed technical assessment before presenting to the board next week.

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Production Bug Still Affecting Users
normal_emails.body: Following up on the production bug I flagged earlier. It's now affecting 500+ users and customers are complaining on Twitter. I really need your approval to deploy the hotfix. Please respond ASAP â€” every minute costs us users.

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Customer Escalation Call â€” They're Cancelling
normal_emails.body: Following up on the customer escalation I emailed about. I never heard back from you and the customer has now submitted a cancellation request. This is $80k ARR at risk. Can you jump on a call in the next hour to help me save this account?

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Board deck metrics â€” presentation is tomorrow
normal_emails.body: I still haven't heard back about which conversion rate figure is correct. The board presentation is tomorrow morning. I've had to make a call and went with 3.2% but wanted to flag this is unconfirmed. Please respond tonight if possible.

normal_emails.subject: Refactor proposal â€” your sign-off needed
normal_emails.body: I've put together a proposal to refactor our authentication module. The current code has significant tech debt and is making new feature work slow. I need your sign-off to schedule it into next quarter's roadmap. The proposal doc is attached (5 pages).

normal_emails.subject: New hire onboarding â€” please schedule 1-on-1
normal_emails.body: We have a new engineer joining next Monday. Please schedule a 30-minute welcome 1-on-1 with them in their first week. I've attached the onboarding checklist â€” there are 3 items assigned to you as their manager.

normal_emails.subject: Planned maintenance window â€” approval needed
normal_emails.body: We're scheduling a database maintenance window for this Saturday 2â€“4 AM. This will cause approximately 10 minutes of downtime. I need your approval before we confirm with the team and notify customers.

normal_emails.subject: Blog post review â€” technical accuracy check
normal_emails.body: We've drafted a technical blog post about our new API and need your team to fact-check it before publishing. It's about 1,200 words. No changes to messaging needed â€” just flag anything technically incorrect. Deadline is end of week.

normal_emails.subject: Feature request â€” bulk export API
normal_emails.body: We've been using your platform for 6 months and love it. One thing we're missing is a bulk data export API. We currently have to export manually which is very time-consuming. Is this on your roadmap? Happy to join a product feedback call.

normal_emails.subject: Expense reports â€” submit by month end
normal_emails.body: Just a reminder that all expense reports for the current month must be submitted by the 28th. Anything submitted after that rolls into next month's cycle. Please submit through Concur and attach all receipts.

normal_emails.subject: Mandatory password rotation â€” action required
normal_emails.body: Your corporate account password has not been rotated in 90 days. Please update it in the next 48 hours or your account will be locked automatically as per our security policy. Instructions are in the IT portal.

normal_emails.subject: Test plan review for v2.4 release
normal_emails.body: I've put together the test plan for the v2.4 release and need your sign-off. The plan covers regression, integration, and load testing. The doc is 12 pages. We need approval by Wednesday to stay on schedule for the Friday release.

normal_emails.subject: Internship project check-in â€” need your 5 minutes
normal_emails.body: Hi, hope you're doing well! I wanted to check in on my internship project. I'm 70% done with the dashboard feature and wanted to make sure I'm heading in the right direction before I finalize. Could we grab 5 minutes this week?

normal_emails.subject: Joint webinar invitation â€” Q1 scheduling
normal_emails.body: We'd love to co-host a webinar with your team in Q1 on the topic of developer experience. We'd handle promotion and logistics â€” your team just needs to provide one speaker for 20 minutes. Interested? Let us know and we'll circulate dates.

normal_emails.subject: Team headcount report â€” data needed
normal_emails.body: I'm pulling together the quarterly headcount report for finance. Could you send me your current team breakdown: full-time vs contract, current open roles, and any planned changes in Q1? Should take about 15 minutes to compile.

normal_emails.subject: Cloud cost spike â€” your team's services
normal_emails.body: Our AWS costs jumped 40% this month. I've traced $12,000 of the increase to services owned by your team â€” looks like a misconfigured autoscaling group. Can you take a look and fix before end of day? I'll send the cost breakdown in a follow-up.

normal_emails.subject: On-call rotation â€” swap request
normal_emails.body: Hey, I'm supposed to be on-call this weekend but I have a family commitment that just came up. Is there any chance you could swap with me? I'd take your next rotation. Completely fine if not â€” just thought I'd ask.

normal_emails.subject: NPS deep-dive analysis â€” feedback needed
normal_emails.body: I've completed the NPS deep-dive analysis for Q3. The full report is 25 pages covering verbatim responses, theme clustering, and recommended product priorities. I'd love your feedback on the product priority section specifically before I present to leadership.

normal_emails.subject: Job description review â€” new senior role
normal_emails.body: We're opening a new Senior Data Engineer role and need your review of the job description before it goes live. Could you check that the technical requirements and responsibilities accurately reflect what the team needs? It's a single page.

normal_emails.subject: SOC 2 audit â€” evidence collection
normal_emails.body: Our annual SOC 2 audit is starting next week. I need your team to provide evidence for 12 controls by Friday. The list is attached. Most items are existing docs or access logs â€” should take 2-3 hours total to gather and format.

normal_emails.subject: Customer case study â€” interview request
normal_emails.body: We'd like to feature your team's work with a key customer in a case study. Would you be available for a 30-minute interview next week? Marketing will write everything up â€” we just need your perspective on the technical challenges you solved.

normal_emails.subject: Onboarding questions â€” need your help getting set up
normal_emails.body: Hi! I'm the new engineering intern starting this week. I have quite a few questions about the codebase architecture, local dev environment setup, and which Slack channels to join. Could you spare 30-60 minutes this week for a walkthrough? No rush â€” whenever you have time.

normal_emails.subject: Quarterly OKR check-in â€” your team's progress
normal_emails.body: It's time for our quarterly OKR review. Could you fill in your team's progress against each objective in the shared doc by Thursday? Takes about 20 minutes. I'll use this to compile the leadership summary before the all-hands.

normal_emails.subject: Feedback needed â€” dashboard redesign concepts
normal_emails.body: I've created three concept directions for the analytics dashboard redesign. Before I invest more time, I'd love your gut reaction on which direction feels most aligned with what users need. The Figma link is below â€” should take 10 minutes to review.

normal_emails.subject: Incident retrospective â€” your input needed
normal_emails.body: Following last week's incident, I'm putting together the retrospective doc. Could you add your observations on what went wrong in the detection phase and what we should do differently? The doc is shared â€” add your notes by Wednesday.

normal_emails.subject: Salary band review â€” manager input requested
normal_emails.body: As part of this year's compensation review cycle, we need managers to flag any team members they believe are significantly outside the new salary bands. Please review the attached bands and reply with any concerns by end of next week.

normal_emails.subject: CI pipeline slow â€” affecting all teams
normal_emails.body: Our CI pipeline build times have increased from 8 minutes to 25 minutes over the last 2 weeks. It's slowing down all engineering teams. I've narrowed it down to 2 possible causes but need your help testing one hypothesis in your team's repo. Can we connect today?

normal_emails.subject: Onboarding questions â€” need a full architecture walkthrough
normal_emails.body: Hi! I'm the new engineering intern starting this week. I have a lot of questions about the codebase and local dev environment. Would it be possible to get a full walkthrough session? I know it's a big ask â€” it would probably take an hour. Happy to work around your schedule.

normal_emails.subject: Feature spec review â€” upcoming quarter
normal_emails.body: I've written up the feature specs for next quarter's roadmap items. There are 6 features in total, each with technical requirements and acceptance criteria. Could you review them for feasibility and flag any concerns? The doc is about 15 pages.

normal_emails.subject: Kubernetes migration â€” your team's services
normal_emails.body: We're migrating all services to Kubernetes next quarter. Your team has 4 services that need config updates before we can move them. I've documented what's needed per service â€” it's straightforward but will take a few hours of your team's time. Can you assign someone?

normal_emails.subject: Fwd: Re: Re: API downtime â€” customer thread
normal_emails.body: Forwarding this for context. The customer has now replied three times and is escalating. See thread below. --- From: angry.client@enterprise.io: 'This is the third time this month. We are evaluating alternatives.' --- From: support@company.com: 'We are investigating.' --- From: angry.client@enterprise.io: 'Investigating is not good enough. I need a call with your engineering lead today.' Can you take this call? The customer is a $200k account.

normal_emails.subject: Can we talk? Feeling overwhelmed
normal_emails.body: Hi, I hope this is okay to send. I've been really struggling lately with the workload and I'm not sure I'm coping well. I don't want to let the team down but I'm finding it hard to keep up. Would you have 20 minutes this week for a private chat? I'd really appreciate it.

normal_emails.subject: OVERDUE: Q3 budget variance report â€” 3 days late
normal_emails.body: Your Q3 budget variance report was due last Monday. It is now 3 days overdue. Finance cannot close the books until this is submitted. I have sent two calendar invites and a Slack message. Please submit via the finance portal today â€” this is now holding up the entire company close process.

normal_emails.subject: GDPR Data Subject Access Request â€” 30-day response deadline
normal_emails.body: We are writing on behalf of our client to submit a formal Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) under Article 15 of the UK GDPR. Our client requests: (1) confirmation of whether personal data is being processed, (2) a copy of all personal data held, (3) the purposes for processing, (4) categories of data involved, (5) recipients or categories of recipients, (6) retention periods, and (7) the source of the data if not collected directly from the data subject. You are legally required to respond within 30 days. Failure to comply may result in a complaint to the ICO. Please acknowledge receipt of this request within 5 business days.

normal_emails.subject: APAC team sync â€” timezone clash blocking alignment
normal_emails.body: Our APAC team (Singapore, Sydney) is currently unable to attend any of our recurring syncs because they all fall between 11 PM and 2 AM their time. The team is feeling disconnected from decisions. Could we rotate one meeting per fortnight to a time that works for them â€” say 8 AM GMT, which is 4 PM SGT? Happy to discuss options.

spam_emails.body: Our monitoring detected unusual API call patterns from your integration causing rate limit errors. This is affecting production for 20+ shared customers. Can we schedule a debug session today to resolve before this escalates further?

spam_emails.subject: Critical vulnerability in your API â€” immediate action required
spam_emails.body: Our security team discovered a critical vulnerability in your public API endpoints. We have sent a detailed report to your security team. Please confirm receipt and provide an expected remediation timeline. Failure to respond may require us to notify regulatory bodies.

spam_emails.subject: ALERT: Unusual outbound traffic detected on your account
spam_emails.body: We have detected a significant spike in outbound traffic from your account in the last 30 minutes. This may indicate a misconfiguration or a security incident. Log in to your dashboard immediately to review and confirm or deny this activity.

spam_emails.subject: Action required: Suspicious login to your admin panel detected
spam_emails.body: Our cross-platform monitoring detected three failed login attempts to your admin panel from IP 185.220.101.34 (Tor exit node). If you did not attempt this, your credentials may be compromised. Reset your admin password immediately and review access logs.
